evals.prompt: I need to read all published posts from my Directus with their author names, sorted by newest first, limit 10
evals.expected_output: Exact JSON for items tool with action:read, filter, dot notation fields, sort, limit
expectations: Uses dot notation for author name (e.g. author.first_name or author.name)

evals.prompt: How do I batch create 50 products in Directus? I have them in a list and want to insert them all
evals.expected_output: Data must be an array, batch in groups of 10-25, read schema first
expectations: Emphasizes data must be an array
Recommends batching in groups of 10-25 items
Advises reading schema first to know required fields
Shows JSON example with data array containing multiple items
